Comment.value: THis script is called from the following locations
1. Button: Create new modifierTemplate in modifierTemplate List
2. Button: Create new modifierTemplate in Block template
3. Button: Create new modifierTemplate in IO Type (template id = FATtype!)
4. Button: Create new modifierTemplate in List template (template id = PrimaryKey)

Calculation.Text: "You must select a base project for the new modifier template."

Comment.value: Message - duplicate name

Calculation.Text: "You are about to create a modifier template. When doing this - all existing items affected by this template will add the modifier." & ¶ & ¶ & "Are you sure you want to do this?"

Comment.value: Find items in the whole FAT created with the selected base project - Title, Package, Chapter, Page, Page item
Create new modifier the ordinary way for all learning programmes using this Base Project
Update all FAT Blocks using the template
Add Modifier value to all existing page items using the symbol
Check for existing duplicates - identical attribute name and parent id
If a duplicate exist - do nothing

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "location_id" ; $attributevalue_id ) & SetProperty ( "source_table" ; "attribute" ) & SetProperty ( "source_mediafield" ; GetFieldName ( FAT Modifier Value::Media id ) ) & SetProperty ( "caller_layout" ; Get(layoutName )) & SetProperty ( "learningprogramme_id" ; $title_id) & SetProperty ( "package_id" ; $package_id)

SetProperty ( "location_id" ; $attributevalue_id ) & SetProperty ( "source_table" ; "attribute" ) & SetProperty ( "source_textfield" ; GetFieldName ( FAT Modifier Value::Text id ) ) & SetProperty ( "caller_layout" ; Get(layoutName )) & SetProperty ( "learningprogramme_id" ; $title_id) & SetProperty ( "package_id" ; $package_id)

Comment.value: If block
Update all FAT Titles so they "own" the attribute
Add Attribute value to all existing IOs using the IO Type
Check for existing duplicates - identical attribute name and parent id
If a duplicate exist - do nothing

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "location_id" ; $attributevalue_id ) & SetProperty ( "source_table" ; "attribute" ) & SetProperty ( "source_mediafield" ; GetFieldName ( FAT Modifier Value::Media id ) ) & SetProperty ( "caller_layout" ; Get(layoutName )) & SetProperty ( "learningprogramme_id" ; $title_id)

SetProperty ( "location_id" ; $attributevalue_id ) & SetProperty ( "source_table" ; "attribute" ) & SetProperty ( "source_textfield" ; GetFieldName ( FAT Modifier Value::Text id ) ) & SetProperty ( "caller_layout" ; Get(layoutName )) & SetProperty ( "learningprogramme_id" ; $title_id)

Comment.value: Update all FAT Titles so they "own" the attribute
Add Attribute value to all existing IOs using the IO Type
Check for existing duplicates - identical attribute name and parent id
If a duplicate exist - do nothing

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "location_id" ; $attributevalue_id ) & SetProperty ( "source_table" ; "attribute" ) & SetProperty ( "source_mediafield" ; GetFieldName ( FAT Modifier Value::Media id ) ) & SetProperty ( "caller_layout" ; Get(layoutName )) & SetProperty ( "learningprogramme_id" ; $title_id)

SetProperty ( "location_id" ; $attributevalue_id ) & SetProperty ( "source_table" ; "attribute" ) & SetProperty ( "source_textfield" ; GetFieldName ( FAT Modifier Value::Text id ) ) & SetProperty ( "caller_layout" ; Get(layoutName )) & SetProperty ( "learningprogramme_id" ; $title_id)

Comment.value: If IO
